overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a coastal pier at sunset in GTA V, starting on a wooden boardwalk with the Los Santos skyline in the distance, passing parked vehicles, and descending onto the beach to walk along the shoreline. The scene features dramatic orange and purple sunset lighting with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier boardwalk with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier boardwalk toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: blue metal railing running along the right side of the wooden pier
wet wooden planks reflecting the orange sunset light
silhouetted downtown skyscrapers against the orange sunset sky
tall black lamppost with glowing white light
calm water reflecting the warm sunset colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow wooden pier boardwalk with blue metal railings on the right and the ocean beyond. The camera walks forward toward the silhouetted Los Santos skyline against a dramatic orange sunset, with wet wooden planks reflecting the warm light.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier parking area with wooden deck

events.description: entering the wider pier parking area where the boardwalk expands

agents.ego_description: walking past parked vehicles on the wider pier surface

notable_agents.action: white muscle car parked on the left side of the wooden pier

entered.detail: white Dodge Challenger-style muscle car parked on the wooden deck
black four-door sedan parked near the pier railing
low-rise structures and tents along the left side of the pier

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider wooden parking area on the pier where a white muscle car and black sedan are parked. The camera continues walking forward, passing the vehicles while the city skyline remains visible ahead, and the pier railing falls away to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area at the base of the pier

events.description: descending from the wooden pier onto the sandy beach level

agents.ego_description: moving down from the pier elevation onto the wet beach sand

entered.detail: wet sand reflecting the orange sunset with puddles of water
concrete and wooden support structure of the pier above
tall palm trees lining the beachfront

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the pier onto the wet beach sand, transitioning from the wooden deck to the shoreline. The pier structure now looms on the left as an elevated mass, while palm trees and beachfront buildings come into view ahead, with the city skyline shifting to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach shoreline with palm tree lined buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet beach path toward the shoreline buildings

entered.detail: white painted bicycle lane symbols and arrows on the sand path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open beach shoreline, the camera moves away from the pier structure which falls behind. The path features bike lane markings on the wet sand, with palm trees and beachfront buildings now lining the left side as the camera continues toward the distant shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow wooden pier that gradually descends and opens onto a wide, wet beach shoreline under a dramatic sunset. It begins on a boardwalk with blue metal railings, moving forward across wet wooden planks that reflect the orange glow of the silhouetted Los Santos skyline. As the path widens, the camera passes a white muscle car and a black sedan parked on the pier before the railing falls away to the right. The scene then shifts as the camera descends from the wooden deck onto the damp sand, leaving the pier structure to loom as an elevated mass on the left while palm trees and beachfront buildings emerge ahead. Finally, the camera moves along the open shoreline past bike lane markings on the wet sand, leaving the pier behind as it advances toward the distant coast.
